seo.title: LLM Latency Optimization for AI Agents in AG2 Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix llm latency optimization for ai agents in AG2 agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In AG2, LLM Latency Optimization for AI Agents manifests as delayed speaker transitions and sluggish group chat consensus due to high token latencies in multi-agent conversations. The framework's enhanced group chat capabilities amplify latency issues, causing agents to miss conversation turns and produce off-topic spirals. Vex integration via message hooks enables precise latency monitoring across AG2's speaker selection and conversation APIs.

howItManifests.scenario: Group chat with 5+ agents using `llm_config` with GPT-4
howItManifests.impact: Agents timeout and conversation derails into off-topic loops
Total workflow latency exceeds 60s, users abandon sessions
Incorrect speaker bias favors slower models, consensus fails
Harmful code outputs due to rushed incomplete generations

detection.name: Message Hook Latency Profiler
detection.description: Registers Vex hook on AG2 agents to measure `on_message()` latency distribution
detection.code:
from ag2 import GroupChat, Agent
from vex_sdk import VexMonitor

def latency_hook(message, agent):
    start = time.perf_counter()
    result = agent.generate_reply(message)
    latency = time.perf_counter() - start
    VexMonitor.record('ag2_llm_latency', latency, tags={'agent': agent.name})
    return result

chat = GroupChat(agents=[agent1, agent2])
chat.register_message_hook(latency_hook)

detection.name: Speaker Selection Bottleneck Detector
detection.description: Monitors `select_speaker()` latency spikes in group chats

detection.name: Token Rate Monitor
detection.description: Calculates tokens/second during AG2 streaming responses
detection.code:
from ag2.core.utils import get_buffer_string

def stream_latency_monitor(agent):
    start_time = time.time()
    token_count = 0
    
    for chunk in agent.stream_response(message):
        tokens = len(chunk['delta'].split())
        token_count += tokens
        elapsed = time.time() - start_time
        rate = token_count / elapsed if elapsed > 0 else 0
        
        if rate < 20:  # tokens/sec threshold
            print(f'⚠️ Low token rate: {rate:.1f} t/s')
    
agent.register_stream_hook(stream_latency_monitor)

fixes.name: Model Quantization + Fast Cache
fixes.code:
from ag2 import llm_config

fast_config = llm_config({
    'config_list': [{
        'model': 'gpt-4o-mini',
        'api_key': os.getenv('OPENAI_API_KEY'),
        'quantization': '4bit',
        'cache_seed': 42  # deterministic caching
    }],
    'temperature': 0.1,
    'max_tokens': 2048,
    'stream': True
})

agent = AssistantAgent(
    name='coder',
    llm_config=fast_config,
    system_message='Respond concisely.'
)

fixes.name: Concurrent Speaker Prefetch
fixes.description: Pre-generates next 2 speakers to mask selection latency

fixes.name: Prompt Compression Middleware
fixes.description: Compresses conversation history before LLM calls

vexAutomation.heading: Automating LLM Latency Optimization for AI Agents Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description: Vex integrates seamlessly with AG2 via `register_message_hook()`, automatically capturing LLM latency metrics across all agent conversations. The SDK profiles token rates, speaker selection delays, and streaming performance in real-time, flagging conversations where latency exceeds 3s per turn. Vex's anomaly detection identifies slow model configurations and speaker biases, while automated remediation suggests optimal `llm_config` settings and enables one-click model switching. For group chats, Vex monitors consensus drift caused by latency imbalances and auto-deploys prefetching optimizations. The platform maintains historical baselines, alerting teams when regressions occur after model updates or traffic spikes.

cta.heading: Detect and Fix This Automatically with Vex
cta.description: Install Vex with `pip install ag2 vex-sdk` and eliminate LLM latency issues in your AG2 agents within minutes.
